home.heroSubtitle: Open an account in 60 seconds. Send money instantly. Get AI-powered insights. Smart Bank brings the future of finance to your pocket.
home.featuresSub: A complete banking platform — accounts, payments, cards, and AI — in one beautiful app.

instant.d: Move money in seconds, 24/7. No waiting, no fees between Smart Bank accounts.

security.d: 256-bit encryption, biometric auth, and real-time fraud detection on every transaction.

ai.d: Ask Aria anything — balances, transfers, financial advice — in natural language.

insights.d: Beautiful dashboards that show where your money goes, every minute.

global.d: Send money to 150+ countries with the best rates and zero hidden charges.

cards.d: Virtual & physical cards with instant freeze, spending limits, and rewards.

home.ctaSub: Open your Smart Bank account in 60 seconds. No fees, no hidden charges.

about.intro: Founded in 2021, Smart Bank exists to give people a banking experience that matches the speed of modern life. We combine elegant design, real engineering, and AI to make managing money simple, safe, and even delightful.

trust.d: Every decision is built on transparency and security.

people.d: We design for humans, not transactions.

borderless.d: Banking that works wherever life takes you.

care.d: 24/7 human + AI support, always there when needed.

services.sub: Everything you need to spend, save, send and grow your money — all in one place.

checking.d: Zero fees, instant onboarding, no minimum balance.

savings.d: Earn up to 4.5% APY with no minimum balance.

transfers.d: Send money to anyone, anywhere in seconds.

cards.d: Virtual & metal cards with cashback rewards.

investing.d: Stocks, ETFs and crypto from one app.

insurance.d: Travel, device & purchase protection bundled in.

mobile.d: Manage everything from your phone with biometric login.

global.d: Send money to 150+ countries at mid-market rates.

contact.sub: Have a question? Our team replies within 24 hours, or chat with Aria for instant help.
contact.name: Name
contact.sent: Message sent! We'll reply within 24 hours.

auth.signInSub: Sign in to access your dashboard.
auth.openSub: Join Smart Bank to manage your finances online.
auth.createdToast: Account created! Welcome to Smart Bank 🎉
auth.pwShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.agreeRequired: Please agree to the Terms & Conditions.

dashboard.analyticsSub: Last 7 days · money in vs money out

footer.tagline: Modern digital banking with bank-grade security and AI-powered support.

chatbot.intro: Hi! I'm **Aria**, your Smart Bank assistant 🤖. Ask me about deposits, transfers, fees, security, or anything else.
chatbot.name: Aria
chatbot.subtitle: Smart Bank AI assistant
chatbot.rate: I'm receiving a lot of requests right now — please try again in a moment.
chatbot.credits: AI credits exhausted. Please add funds in your workspace settings.
chatbot.error: Sorry, I had trouble responding. Please try again.
